disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known Crohn's disease of ~2 years with chronic right-sided crampy pain and loose motions (patient's stated baseline condition)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any bowel conditions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had Crohn's disease for about two years — usually crampy pain low on the right and loose bowel motions.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New high-volume bilious (green) vomiting, unable to tolerate any oral intake
trigger_question_examples: Are you vomiting? What does it look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep throwing up green bile and I can't keep down even a sip of water.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absolute constipation — no stool and no flatus passed (obstipation)
trigger_question_examples: When did you last open your bowels?
Have you been able to pass wind?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't been to the toilet at all and I can't even pass any wind since this started.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe progressive abdominal distension with colicky, wave-like pain
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain constant or does it come in waves?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My stomach is blown up like a balloon and the pain comes in awful waves.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Stopped immunomodulator (azathioprine) ~6 months ago due to side effects — non-adherence
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any medication for your Crohn's?
Have you stopped any of your treatment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I was on an immune-calming tablet but I stopped it about six months ago because of the side effects.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Low-grade fever and feeling sweaty/unwell during the current flare
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel feverish or have you taken your temperature?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel hot and sweaty and my home thermometer said 37.9.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked unintentional weight loss, fatigue and cachectic appearance (chronic disease burden)
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost a lot of weight without trying and I've been completely wiped out for months.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of complex perianal disease — skin tags and a previously drained fistula
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any problems around the back passage?
Any fistulas or abscesses in the past?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had painful skin tags and a fistula near my back passage that had to be drained before.
